proposal1.heroHeadline: Redpineagency is losing 500 hours a year writing proposals. Here's why it matters.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manual proposal writing takes hours. Our system automates it in 47 seconds, ready for your clients.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the ongoing costs Redpineagency faces with current proposal processes.

problems.title: Lost Sales Hours
problems.description: Every hour spent writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This costs Redpineagency an estimated $50,000 annually in lost sales opportunities.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually written proposals often lack uniformity. This inconsistency can confuse clients and potentially cost Redpineagency $10,000 in lost trust and contracts.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled employees to manually craft proposals is expensive, costing Redpineagency approximately $100,000 yearly in labor alone.

problems.title: Delayed Turnaround Time
problems.description: Manual proposal generation leads to delays. These delays can result in a 20% decrease in client conversion rates, costing Redpineagency $30,000 in potential revenue.

problems.title: Human Error Risk
problems.description: Errors in proposals can lead to lost deals and damaged reputation. This risk could cost Redpineagency $20,000 in corrective actions and missed opportunities.

problems.title: Inefficient Resource Use
problems.description: Resources spent on manual proposal creation are not used for strategic growth. This inefficiency bleeds $40,000 yearly in potential innovation and development.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces these costly and inefficient processes.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Current process takes hours. Our system completes it in under 60 seconds, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals vary. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with Redpineagency's brand, maintaining client trust.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: High labor costs drain resources. Our AI reduces the need for manual labor, saving money.

solutions.title: Faster Turnaround
solutions.description: Current delays hurt conversion rates. Our system speeds up delivery, increasing client satisfaction.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Human errors can cost deals. Our AI ensures accuracy, protecting Redpineagency's reputation.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Wavecrest's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Wavecrest around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Redpineagency.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Brand with Redpineagency's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a strategic plan to optimize your brand visibility and increase conversions through targeted digital campaigns.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to underperforming digital strategies.

problems.title: Low Website Conversion
problems.description: Every visitor leaving without converting results in lost revenue. Current conversion rate is below industry standards at 1.5%.

problems.title: Poor Social Media Engagement
problems.description: With engagement rates at only 0.8%, potential customer interest is slipping away daily.

problems.title: Ineffective Email Campaigns
problems.description: Open rates are at a low 12%, resulting in missed opportunities for customer re-engagement.

problems.title: Stagnant Brand Awareness
problems.description: Brand searches are declining by 5% monthly, indicating a drop in market presence.

problems.title: High Customer Acquisition Costs
problems.description: Current strategies are not cost-effective, leading to a 20% higher CAC compared to competitors.

problems.title: Inadequate SEO Performance
problems.description: Organic traffic is not meeting expectations, with a 10% yearly decline in search rankings.

proposal2.solutionIntro: We offer targeted solutions to address each of these issues effectively.

solutions.title: Digital Marketing Strategy
solutions.description: Craft comprehensive campaigns to boost conversions and brand engagement.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Improve search rankings and drive organic traffic to your site.

solutions.title: Email Marketing Revamp
solutions.description: Enhance email strategies to increase open rates and customer engagement.

solutions.title: Social Media Management
solutions.description: Boost social presence with tailored content and consistent interaction.
